sections.section_purpose: To provide detailed pricing information as required by the tender.
sections.response_guidance: Complete the pricing schedule as specified in the tender. Reference annexes where required.

sections.section_purpose: To confirm acceptance or propose deviations from the draft contract terms.
sections.response_guidance: State acceptance of, or proposed deviations from, the draft contract terms.

sections.section_purpose: To outline the approach for transitioning services in and out.
sections.response_guidance: Describe the approach to transition-in and, if applicable, transition-out.

sections.section_purpose: To describe the security framework and controls relevant to the engagement.
sections.response_guidance: Describe the security framework, controls, and certifications relevant to this engagement.

sections.section_purpose: To list key personnel with their roles and qualifications.
sections.response_guidance: List proposed key personnel with roles, qualifications, and relevant experience.

sections.section_purpose: To describe the service management framework and performance management.
sections.response_guidance: Describe the service management framework, including ITSM processes, SLAs, and escalation paths.
